author: codestrongestx
name: 10L FP16 Embed Warmdown20k
blurb: Non-record derivative submission built on the merged 10-layer FP16-embed sliding-window baseline. Main ML change is WARMDOWN_ITERS=20000; the verified 8xH100 seed-42 run reached 1.17389939 post-roundtrip while staying under the 16MB cap.
